What We Do

Full-Service
Pumping & Maintenance

From routine septic maintenance to emergency environmental pumping, Direct Pumping has the equipment, experience, and team to handle any job — residential or commercial.

🪣

Septic Tank Pumping

Professional septic pumping for residential and commercial systems. We remove all solids and waste efficiently with minimal disruption to your property.

Learn More →
🔍

Septic Inspections

Detailed system evaluations for home buyers, sellers, and routine maintenance. We provide written reports and clear recommendations.

Learn More →
🍽️

Grease Trap Service

Scheduled and emergency grease trap pumping and cleaning for restaurants and food service facilities. Stay compliant and odor-free.

Learn More →
🌿

Environmental Pumping

Environmental waste removal and disposal services handled in full compliance with local and state regulations. Proper, responsible, documented.

Learn More →
⚙️

Aerobic System Maintenance

Quarterly maintenance contracts, chlorine service, spray head inspections, and compliance reporting for aerobic septic systems across North Texas.

Learn More →
🏗️

Lift Station Service

Wet well pumping, cleaning, and maintenance for residential, commercial, and municipal lift stations. Emergency response available 24/7.

Learn More →
💧

Wastewater Treatment Plants

Sludge removal, bypass pumping, and scheduled maintenance contracts for municipal, industrial, and utility-owned treatment facilities.

Learn More →
Why Direct Pumping

We Don't
Cut Corners.

01

Fully Licensed & Insured

Our team carries all required state and local licenses for septic and environmental pumping work. You're covered, every time.

02

Upfront, Honest Pricing

No surprise charges. We assess the job and give you a clear quote before any work begins.

03

Same-Day & Emergency Service

Septic and plumbing emergencies don't wait — neither do we. Call us any time, day or night.

04

Locally Owned & Operated

We're not a franchise. We're your neighbors, invested in the community and accountable to you directly.
